title: New Zealand Evangelion 333 up for preorder on Mightyape
display_title: New Zealand Evangelion 333 up for preorder on Mightyape
wikitext:
[]: New Zealand Evangelion 3.33 up for preorder on Mightyape             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Tue Feb 25, 2014 12:30 am http://www.mightyape.co.nz/product/Evangelion-333-You-Can-Not-Redo/22100084 Not sure if the release date is going to be pushed back from the stated March 20th, but I hope not. It's so close.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Tue Feb 25, 2014 4:37 am I'm guessing this is supposed to be the Madman release which is still TBA like all the others including Funimation.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 25, 2014 4:20 pm I like how that summary avoids the line "[14 years after] the Third Impact"; it's good to not reveal such a huge spoiler to fans. Funimation...!
